summary: La cúpula de la Agencia Tributaria se renovará en los próximos días después de la salida de Soledad Fernández como directora general. Hacienda niega los rumores de crisis y que se trate de un cese, sino de un "relevo" consensuado "desde hace meses". El PP mantiene su citación a la comisión de invest

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
summary: Coach crash in Catalonia leaves 44 injured, rate of rich people in Spain soars by 30 percent, Spain to face Austria in World Cup round of 32 and more news on Thursday July 2nd.

title: Can my landlord stop me from smoking in my rental in Spain?
summary: Whether or not you can smoke in your flat or even on the balcony depends on several different factors and can in some cases come down to the goodwill of your landlord and neighbours.

title: How rural Spain is embracing LGBTQ+ initiatives
summary: Small town Spain is breaking down barriers and showing that 'pueblos' can be progressive and welcoming places for sexual minorities, even helping revitalise some of the country's depopulated areas at the same time.

title: Spain records more than 1,000 heat-related June deaths
summary: More than 1,000 deaths in Spain were attributed to the recent heatwave that roasted Europe, as the country posted the hottest first six months ever recorded, officials said on Wednesday.
